D2 Vision L5 Evaluate Reference

Rhodopsin Bleaching & Recovery

slide the time after a bleach and watch rhodopsin regenerate while the visual threshold falls

Light bleaches rhodopsin, and the rod cannot signal until the pigment regenerates. Recovery is exponential, and the threshold tracks the bleached fraction.

Set how much pigment a flash bleaches, then slide the time spent in darkness. Watch the unbleached fraction climb back toward 1 while the log threshold falls — the slow price of seeing again after a bright light.
